model.fintech.stg_orders.name: stg_orders
model.fintech.stg_orders.compiled_code:
SELECT
  order_id,
  customer_id,
  product_id,
  order_date,
  status,
  amount,
  currency,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM `fintech`.`raw`.`orders`
WHERE status IS NOT NULL
model.fintech.stg_orders.raw_code:
SELECT
  order_id,
  customer_id,
  product_id,
  order_date,
  status,
  amount,
  currency,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM {{ source('fintech', 'raw_orders') }}
WHERE status IS NOT NULL
model.fintech.stg_orders.description: Staged orders from raw source with basic cleaning and standardization

model.fintech.stg_customers.name: stg_customers
model.fintech.stg_customers.compiled_code:
SELECT
  customer_id,
  email,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  phone,
  country,
  signup_date,
  is_active,
  created_at
FROM `fintech`.`raw`.`customers`
WHERE email IS NOT NULL
model.fintech.stg_customers.raw_code:
SELECT

  created_at
FROM {{ source('fintech', 'raw_customers') }}
WHERE email IS NOT NULL
model.fintech.stg_customers.description: Staged customers from raw source with email validation and standardization

model.fintech.stg_products.name: stg_products
model.fintech.stg_products.compiled_code:

  product_id,

  category,
  price,
  currency,
  is_active,
  created_at
FROM `fintech`.`raw`.`products`
WHERE is_active = TRUE

model.fintech.int_orders_enriched.name: int_orders_enriched
model.fintech.int_orders_enriched.compiled_code:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  o.customer_id,
  o.product_id,
  o.order_date,
  o.status,
  o.amount,
  o.currency,
  c.email AS customer_email,
  c.country AS customer_country,
  p.product_name,
  p.category AS product_category,
  p.price AS unit_price
FROM `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_orders` o
LEFT JOIN `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_customers` c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
LEFT JOIN `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_products` p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
model.fintech.int_orders_enriched.raw_code:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  o.customer_id,
  o.product_id,
  o.order_date,
  o.status,
  o.amount,
  o.currency,
  c.email AS customer_email,
  c.country AS customer_country,
  p.product_name,
  p.category AS product_category,
  p.price AS unit_price
FROM {{ ref('stg_orders') }} o
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('stg_customers') }} c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('stg_products') }} p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
model.fintech.int_orders_enriched.description: Orders enriched with customer and product information for downstream analytics

model.fintech.int_customer_lifetime_valu.name: int_customer_lifetime_value
model.fintech.int_customer_lifetime_valu.compiled_code:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.email,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.country,
  c.signup_date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders,
  SUM(o.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(o.amount) AS avg_order_value,
  MIN(o.order_date) AS first_order_date,
  MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date,
  DATE_DIFF(MAX(o.order_date), MIN(o.order_date), DAY) AS customer_lifespan_days
FROM `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_customers` c
LEFT JOIN `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_orders` o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
model.fintech.int_customer_lifetime_valu.raw_code:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.email,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.country,
  c.signup_date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders,
  SUM(o.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(o.amount) AS avg_order_value,
  MIN(o.order_date) AS first_order_date,
  MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date,
  DATE_DIFF(MAX(o.order_date), MIN(o.order_date), DAY) AS customer_lifespan_days
FROM {{ ref('stg_customers') }} c
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('stg_orders') }} o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6

customer_lifespan_days.name: customer_lifespan_days
customer_lifespan_days.description: Days between first and last order

model.fintech.int_customer_lifetime_valu.description: Customer lifetime value metrics aggregated from orders history

model.fintech.int_payment_summary.name: int_payment_summary
model.fintech.int_payment_summary.compiled_code:
SELECT
  p.order_id,
  p.customer_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_id) AS payment_attempts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'success' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END) AS paid_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_attempts,
  MAX(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'success' THEN p.payment_date END) AS successful_payment_date,
  ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT p.payment_method) AS payment_methods_used
FROM `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_payments` p
GROUP BY 1,2
model.fintech.int_payment_summary.raw_code:
SELECT
  p.order_id,
  p.customer_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_id) AS payment_attempts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'success' THEN p.amount ELSE 0 END) AS paid_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_attempts,
  MAX(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 'success' THEN p.payment_date END) AS successful_payment_date,
  ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT p.payment_method) AS payment_methods_used
FROM {{ ref('stg_payments') }} p
GROUP BY 1,2
model.fintech.int_payment_summary.description: Payment summary per order with success/failure breakdown

model.fintech.fct_orders.name: fct_orders
model.fintech.fct_orders.compiled_code:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  o.customer_id,
  o.product_id,
  o.order_date,
  o.status,
  o.amount AS order_amount,
  o.currency,
  o.customer_email,
  o.customer_country,
  o.product_name,
  o.product_category,
  p.paid_amount,
  p.payment_attempts,
  p.failed_attempts,
  p.successful_payment_date,
  CASE
    WHEN o.amount >= 1000 THEN 'high_value'
    WHEN o.amount >= 100 THEN 'medium_value'
    ELSE 'low_value'
  END AS order_tier
FROM `fintech`.`intermediate`.`int_orders_enriched` o
LEFT JOIN `fintech`.`intermediate`.`int_payment_summary` p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
model.fintech.fct_orders.raw_code:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  o.customer_id,
  o.product_id,
  o.order_date,
  o.status,
  o.amount AS order_amount,
  o.currency,
  o.customer_email,
  o.customer_country,
  o.product_name,
  o.product_category,
  p.paid_amount,
  p.payment_attempts,
  p.failed_attempts,
  p.successful_payment_date,
  CASE
    WHEN o.amount >= 1000 THEN 'high_value'
    WHEN o.amount >= 100 THEN 'medium_value'
    ELSE 'low_value'
  END AS order_tier
FROM {{ ref('int_orders_enriched') }} o
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('int_payment_summary') }} p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
model.fintech.fct_orders.description: Fact table containing all orders with enriched customer, product, and payment data

model.fintech.fct_payments.name: fct_payments
model.fintech.fct_payments.compiled_code:
SELECT
  ps.order_id,
  ps.customer_id,
  ps.payment_attempts,
  ps.paid_amount,
  ps.failed_attempts,
  ps.successful_payment_date,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(1, ps.payment_attempts), 4) AS first_attempt_success_rate,
  CASE WHEN ps.failed_attempts = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS no_failures
FROM `fintech`.`intermediate`.`int_payment_summary` ps
model.fintech.fct_payments.raw_code:
SELECT
  ps.order_id,
  ps.customer_id,
  ps.payment_attempts,
  ps.paid_amount,
  ps.failed_attempts,
  ps.successful_payment_date,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(1, ps.payment_attempts), 4) AS first_attempt_success_rate,
  CASE WHEN ps.failed_attempts = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS no_failures
FROM {{ ref('int_payment_summary') }} ps
model.fintech.fct_payments.description: Fact table for payment transactions with success/failure metrics

model.fintech.dim_customers.name: dim_customers
model.fintech.dim_customers.compiled_code:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.email,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.country,
  c.signup_date,
  c.is_active,
  clv.total_orders,
  clv.total_revenue,
  clv.avg_order_value,
  clv.first_order_date,
  clv.last_order_date,
  clv.customer_lifespan_days,
  CASE
    WHEN clv.total_revenue >= 10000 THEN 'platinum'
    WHEN clv.total_revenue >= 1000 THEN 'gold'
    WHEN clv.total_revenue >= 100 THEN 'silver'
    ELSE 'bronze'
  END AS customer_tier
FROM `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_customers` c
LEFT JOIN `fintech`.`intermediate`.`int_customer_lifetime_value` clv ON c.customer_id = clv.customer_id
model.fintech.dim_customers.raw_code:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.email,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.country,
  c.signup_date,
  c.is_active,
  clv.total_orders,
  clv.total_revenue,
  clv.avg_order_value,
  clv.first_order_date,
  clv.last_order_date,
  clv.customer_lifespan_days,
  CASE
    WHEN clv.total_revenue >= 10000 THEN 'platinum'
    WHEN clv.total_revenue >= 1000 THEN 'gold'
    WHEN clv.total_revenue >= 100 THEN 'silver'
    ELSE 'bronze'
  END AS customer_tier
FROM {{ ref('stg_customers') }} c
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('int_customer_lifetime_value') }} clv ON c.customer_id = clv.customer_id
model.fintech.dim_customers.description: Customer dimension table with lifetime value metrics and tier classification

model.fintech.dim_products.name: dim_products
model.fintech.dim_products.compiled_code:
SELECT
  p.product_id,
  p.product_name,
  p.category,
  p.price,
  p.currency,
  p.is_active,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders,
  SUM(o.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(o.amount) AS avg_order_value
FROM `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_products` p
LEFT JOIN `fintech`.`staging`.`stg_orders` o ON p.product_id = o.product_id
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
model.fintech.dim_products.raw_code:
SELECT
  p.product_id,
  p.product_name,
  p.category,
  p.price,
  p.currency,
  p.is_active,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders,
  SUM(o.amount) AS total_revenue,
  AVG(o.amount) AS avg_order_value
FROM {{ ref('stg_products') }} p
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('stg_orders') }} o ON p.product_id = o.product_id
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
model.fintech.dim_products.description: Product dimension table with sales performance metrics
